(a) 1st Row 58 17 5 ‚áí 58 + 17 = 75
‚áí 75 - 5 = 70
= n
2nd Row 85 5 n ‚áí 85 + 5 = 90
‚áí 90 - n = 85 + 5 = 17
‚áí 17 √ó 15 = 255
‚ąī Resultant of second row = 255

(b) 1st Row 24 64 15 ‚áí 64 - 24 = 40
‚áí 40 + 15 = 55
= m
2nd Row m 11 15 ‚áí 55 11 15
‚áí 55 + 11 = 66
‚áí 66 √∑ 5 √ó 15 = 75
‚ąī Resultant of second row = 75

(d) 1st Row 73 34 13 ‚áí 73 - 34 = 39
‚áí 39 + 13 = 3 = p
2nd Row 32 p 15 ‚áí 32 3 15
‚áí 32 + 3 = 35
‚áí 35 √ó 15 = 525
‚ąī Resultant of second row = 525

(d) 1st Row 14 5 9 ‚áí 14 + 5 = 19
‚áí 19 √ó 9 = 171
= w
2nd Row 24 w 88 ‚áí 24 171 88
‚áí 24 + 171 = 195
‚áí 195 - 88 = 107
‚ąī Resultant of second row = 107

(e) 1st Row 16 7 25 ‚áí 16 √ó 7 = 112
‚áí 112 - 25 = 87
2nd Row m 23 22 ‚áí 87 23 22
‚áí 87 + 23 = 110
‚áí 110 - 22 = 5
‚ąī Resultant of second row = 5

(b) 1st Row 125 64 33 ‚áí 125 - 64 = 61
‚áí 61 + 33 = 94
= x
2nd Row 282 x 39 ‚áí 282 94 39
‚áí 282 + 94 = 3
‚áí 3 + 39 = 42
‚ąī Resultant of second row = 42

(c) 1st Row 24 7 81 ‚áí 24 √ó 7 = 168
‚áí 168 - 81 = 87
= x
2nd Row x 27 19 ‚áí 87 27 19
‚áí 87 + 27 = 114
‚áí 114 √∑ 19 = 6
‚ąī Resultant of second row = 6
